title: notocactus rutilans var. gutierrezii
intro: Notocactus rutilans var. gutierrezii, also known as the 'Red Mammillaria' or 'Red Pincushion Cactus', is a type of cactus that belongs to the Echinopsis family. The plant is known for its red or reddish-brown spines, which provide protection from excessive sunlight and dryness, and its white or pale-yellow flowers that bloom after the summer rains. Notocactus rutilans var. gutierrezii has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's herbal preparations can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and promote overall well-being.
